title: Trigger index (per-store <store>/trigger-index.json) — RFC-009 R2 / RFC-011 R2
description: Closed, versioned contract for the DERIVED trigger index emitted by em-trigger-index.mjs. schema_version is const 3 (v3, RFC-011 R2 R2.6): additive additions are session_start.playbooks (+ playbooks_capped + playbooks_capped_first), the entry_class/read_command entry fields, the conditional effective_priority minimum (0 for entry_class:'playbook' rows, 1 otherwise), build_report.playbooks, and the extended source fingerprint (playbooks_* unconditional, global_index_* when a valid preference file exists). A cached v2 index is treated as stale and rebuilt (T12). review_by is emitted only when the lesson carries one (em-trigger-index.mjs build), so it is optional. entry_class:'playbook' rows carry read_command (required on those rows; RFC-011 R2).

source.description: index_* is the LOCAL store's index.jsonl fingerprint (existing). playbooks_* is the <store>/playbooks.json fingerprint, recorded UNCONDITIONALLY on every v3 build (zero-state when the file is absent — CREATE/edit/DELETE all invalidate, RFC-011 R2.5). global_index_* is the GLOBAL store's index.jsonl fingerprint, recorded when-and-only-when a valid preference file exists (config-free projects pay no cross-store coupling); it is therefore OPTIONAL here.

build_report.description: excluded_activity_classes (RFC-009 P2). playbooks (RFC-011 R2.2/R2.3): the consent audit surface — declared accepts, capped_ids, and the exclusion counters are emitted on EVERY build (empty when no preference file or nothing accepted).

session_start.description: critical_entries/entries/preflight (RFC-009 REQ-15). playbooks + playbooks_capped + playbooks_capped_first (RFC-011 R2) are local-store-only, threaded through BOTH merge sites; they are PRESENT iff a valid preference file was processed (even an empty playbooks:[]), absent otherwise (deleted/malformed -> section gone, EC1/EC7).

triggerEntry.$comment: F6a (S2 fix): read_command and triggers_overridden are BOUND under the entry_class:'playbook' conditional. read_command is REQUIRED on playbook rows and FORBIDDEN on lesson rows; triggers_overridden is OPTIONAL on playbook rows (present only on rows derived under a DECLARED override — RFC-011 R1 override clause / R2.9; the merged view mutes the episode's own trigger rows, T6 E2E) and FORBIDDEN on lesson rows. A forged lesson row carrying either is REJECTED, closing the forged-shape acceptance the pre-fix schema permitted. Implemented as four allOf if/then branches (all in the closed-subset validator's modeled keyword set: if/then/not/required/properties/minimum).
triggerEntry.description: A lesson-activation trigger row (RFC-009 R1/R2) OR a derived playbook row (RFC-011 R2, entry_class:'playbook'). Playbook rows pin effective_priority to 0 (sort below every lesson in top-K), set applies_to_tools to ['*'] (the wildcard, never empty — scopeOk rejects empty), carry this project's slug in applies_to_projects, and MUST carry read_command. triggers_overridden is OPTIONAL on playbook rows (present only when the on_demand entry was derived under a declared override) and FORBIDDEN on lesson rows. The effective_priority minimum is conditional (R2.6): 0 for playbook rows, 1 for lesson rows.

playbooksReport.description: RFC-011 R2.2/R2.3. declared lists every ACCEPTED {episode_id, mode} (the resolved terminal id + mode) on every build — the consent audit surface. capped_ids lists the session_start declarations beyond max_playbooks. excluded counts every dropped declaration by reason (none fatal; advisory surfaces fail open to nothing). note + warnings are optional augmentations for the malformed-file note (R1) and the oversized/unpinned selected-playbook warnings (R2/R5a).
